title: Dashboard redesign — LIVE tab: game monitor, position cards, account strip
gate: DASHBOARD_REDESIGN_SHELL_001 is APPROVED. EXECUTION_HELD_SIDE_SEMANTICS_001 is APPROVED. Gate cleared — may begin.
dashboard_server_change_policy: dashboard_server.py may only be modified if a specific field is absent from existing API responses and is truly required for the LIVE tab. Any such change must be listed explicitly in deliverables with justification. Default assumption: no server changes needed.
objective: Implement the full LIVE tab content: live game monitor, active position cards using held-contract truth, and account strip. This is the primary focal area — the user should land here and see all active information without scrolling on a standard display. All pricing must use the verified truth model: current_held_price sourced from stream-backed held-side bid, not raw YES price.

truth_model_requirements.current_price_authority: BACKEND/SSE OWNS HELD-SIDE NORMALIZATION. The SSE positions_mark event already delivers a normalized current_price field that reflects the correct held-side bid (bid_yes for BUY_YES, bid_no for BUY_NO). The frontend MUST use positions_mark.current_price directly. It must NOT recompute held-side price from mark.bid_yes or mark.bid_no.
truth_model_requirements.frontend_price_rule: If positions_mark.current_price is present, use it and only it. Do not derive a second current_price from bid_yes/bid_no in frontend JS. Any frontend code that branches on trade.side to pick bid_yes vs bid_no is a HARD REJECT — that logic belongs in the backend only.
truth_model_requirements.reject_condition: Any JS pattern like: (trade.side === 'BUY_YES' ? mark.bid_yes : mark.bid_no) is REJECTED unless positions_mark.current_price is genuinely absent from the SSE payload AND that absence is explicitly documented in the result.
truth_model_requirements.unrealized_pnl: Use SSE-provided unrealized_pnl_usd or unrealized_pnl directly if present. If not present, derive from positions_mark.current_price (not from bid_yes/bid_no): (current_price - entry_px) * qty.
truth_model_requirements.live_equity: Use SSE-provided live_equity_usd directly if present. If not present, derive from positions_mark.current_price: current_price * qty.
truth_model_requirements.backed_team_display: Each position card must show backed_team prominently. 'Backing LAD' or 'LAD WIN' — not 'BUY_YES on mlb-lad-sd'. The YES/NO side may appear as a small secondary label only.
truth_model_requirements.tp_sl_display: TP and SL thresholds must be shown on each position card. Source from /api/trades tp_price and sl_price fields.
truth_model_requirements.fallback_label: If stream data is stale (>30s), show a 'STALE' or 'FALLBACK' badge on that position's price. Never silently show stale data as live.
truth_model_requirements.shadow_exclusion: Shadow/advisory model recommendations must NOT appear in the LIVE tab. They belong in GAMES tab only.
truth_model_requirements.no_competing_price_writers: There is exactly one current_price source: SSE positions_mark.current_price. No JS may write, override, or recompute current_price from any other source.

section_1_game_monitor.description: Cards showing live MLB games. One card per active game. Sorted: games with open positions first, then other live games, then upcoming.
fields_per_card: inning + half (TOP/BOT) or game status (FINAL, SCHEDULED)
Active position indicator badge if a position is open on this game
Model signal indicator (small, secondary) if shadow rec exists — labeled 'Advisory' not 'Signal'

section_2_position_cards.description: Active open paper positions only. Each card shows full held-contract truth.
fields_per_card: current_held_price (stream-backed, with STALE badge if >30s old)
section_2_position_cards.data_source: /api/trades (for static fields) + SSE stream (for current_held_price mark)

section_3_account_strip.description: Compact strip below position cards. Always visible within LIVE tab.

changes: Populate #tab-live with three sections: game monitor, position cards, account strip
buildLiveGameMonitor() function: renders game cards from /api/games data, sorted by position presence then live status
buildLivePositionCards() function: renders position cards using positions_mark.current_price directly — no bid_yes/bid_no branching in frontend
buildAccountStrip() function: renders bankroll, committed, win rate from /api/state r25 fields
SSE update path: on positions_mark event, read position.current_price and write it in-place to the DOM element (no full re-render, no held-side derivation)
Stale detection: if SSE last_update > 30s ago, add STALE class to affected price fields
LIVE tab is the default visible tab (already set in shell phase, confirm preserved)
No shadow/advisory data in this tab
No JS code that branches on trade.side to pick bid_yes vs bid_no — backend has already done this

deliverables.required_only_if: A specific field is missing from /api/state or /api/trades that is listed in the layout above. Document the field, why it is missing, and the minimal addition. If no fields are missing, do not touch this file.

preflight_questions: Read DASHBOARD_REDESIGN_SPEC_001.md — what fields are listed for each LIVE tab section?
Inspect the actual SSE positions_mark event payload: does it include a current_price field? List all fields present.
Read dashboard.html — does the current SSE handler update position prices in-place or re-render?
Read dashboard_server.py /api/state — does it currently return r25.win_rate, r25.expectancy, r25.sample_size?
Read dashboard_server.py /api/trades — does it return backed_team, faded_team, tp_price, sl_price, qty?
Does /api/games return inning, score, status for live games? If not, this is a known limitation — document it, do not add new scraping.
acceptance_criteria: LIVE tab shows game monitor, position cards, account strip in correct vertical order
Position cards show backed_team prominently, not raw market slug
CRITICAL: position card current price is sourced from positions_mark.current_price — no frontend bid_yes/bid_no branching on trade.side
CRITICAL: no JS code of the form (trade.side === 'BUY_YES' ? mark.bid_yes : mark.bid_no) exists in the LIVE tab implementation
unrealized_pct derived from positions_mark.current_price (or SSE unrealized field directly): (current_price - entry_px) / entry_px
STALE badge appears on price if SSE stream is silent for >30s
No shadow/advisory data appears in LIVE tab
Account strip shows win rate from r25 (not hardcoded or from old win_rate field)
SSE price updates are in-place DOM updates — no full re-render on every tick
No JS console errors on load
Mobile view: cards stack vertically, no horizontal scroll at 390px
proof_of_work: State exactly what fields the SSE positions_mark event provides — list them
Show the exact JS line that reads current price from the SSE event (must be positions_mark.current_price or equivalent normalized field, NOT a bid_yes/bid_no branch)
Show the unrealized_pct formula as it appears in JS — must use current_price, not bid_yes/bid_no
Confirm backed_team is displayed, not market slug
Confirm shadow data is absent from LIVE tab DOM
State whether dashboard_server.py was modified (and if so, exactly what field was added and why)
Confirm: grep for 'bid_yes' and 'bid_no' in the new LIVE tab JS — both must be absent from frontend price logic
out_of_scope: Any strategy or model logic changes
Any new scraping or data fetching beyond what existing APIs provide
Any changes to the truth model pricing chain
rollback: Revert dashboard.html. If dashboard_server.py was modified, revert it too. No DB or model changes to revert.
